title: Fix variable initialization in class methods

features.name: variable initialization in class task method
features.description: Code should include a class task method that initializes a local variable with a literal value inside the task body, relying on automatic storage semantics

features.name: class method with explicit static lifetime qualifier
features.description: Code should include a class task declared with an explicit 'static' lifetime qualifier placed between the keyword and the task name, which is forbidden by the LRM

features.name: static class method vs class method with static lifetime
features.description: Code should include both a static class method declared with 'static task' and a class method with static lifetime declared as 'task static', to distinguish the two syntactically distinct constructs with different legality
